name: Chocolate Sauerkraut Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sauerkraut, rinsed and drained thoroughly, chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut thoroughly, then chop coarsely.
2. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream together the butter and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla.
5. Alternately add dry ingredients and water to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition. Stir in sauerkraut.
6. Spread batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool on a rack.
8. Frost with Creamy Chocolate Frosting and cut into squares.
